hero.body: Family-owned AC services across South Florida. Installation, repair, maintenance, and emergency support — in English & Spanish.

services.label: What We Do
services.title: Complete AC Solutions
services.subtitle: From new installations to emergency repairs, we handle every aspect of your air conditioning needs.

installation.title: Installation
installation.desc: New AC unit installation for homes and businesses, sized and configured for maximum efficiency.

repair.title: Repair
repair.desc: Fast diagnosis and repair of any AC issue — we get your system running again quickly.

maintenance.title: Maintenance
maintenance.desc: Scheduled tune-ups and annual plans to keep your system running at peak performance year-round.

commercial.title: Commercial
commercial.desc: Full-scale commercial HVAC solutions for offices, retail, and industrial spaces across South Florida.

residential.title: Residential
residential.desc: Personalized home comfort solutions with energy-efficient systems tailored to your home.

emergency.title: Emergency Service
emergency.desc: AC broke down at midnight? We're available 24/7 for urgent repairs when you need us most.

whyUs.label: Why Choose Us
whyUs.title: We're Your Neighbors, Not Just Your Technicians

family.title: Family-Owned
family.desc: A real South Florida family committed to honest pricing and lasting relationships — not corporate quotas.

licensed.title: Licensed & Insured
licensed.desc: Fully licensed, bonded, and insured. You can trust our technicians in your home or business.

bilingual.title: Bilingual Service
bilingual.desc: We serve you in both English and Spanish — because communication is everything when it comes to your comfort.

contact.label: Get in Touch
contact.title: Ready to Stay Cool?
contact.body: Call us directly or fill out the form and we'll get back to you within the hour during business hours.
contact.messagePlaceholder: Describe your AC issue or what you need...
contact.successMessage: Message sent! We'll get back to you shortly.
contact.errorMessage: Something went wrong. Please call us directly.
